articles.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
articles.content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile在诉讼中将数万台虚拟机从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: T-Mobile希望Broadcom继续支持其VMware永久许可证。

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
articles.titleZh: 杀死受Skiff影响的电子邮件应用程序的概念，因为大多数用户使用人工智能代理
articles.contentZh: 概念是“全力以赴使用代理来运行您的收件箱。”

articles.title: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
articles.content: Apple is working on a "revamped" version of its entry-level MacBook Pro that it could launch as soon as the first half of 2027, Bloomberg reports. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros that are set to launch in the spring with a focus on "internal improvements." The updated MacBook Pro, which will […]
articles.titleZh: 苹果的入门级MacBook Pro可能会重新设计
articles.contentZh: 据彭博社报道，苹果正在开发其入门级MacBook Pro的“改版”版本，最快可能在2027年上半年推出。该公司还在测试四款新的iPad Pro ，它们将于春季推出，重点是“内部改进”。“更新的MacBook Pro ，它将[…]

articles.title: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
articles.content: Cody Spencer, the co-owner of the small games retail chain Pink Gorilla Games, put it well when I asked about the impact of Sony's recent announcement that it will stop making discs for new games starting January 2028. "It's sad to see. This decision is only a negative for gamers. We're losing the ability to […]
articles.contentZh: 当我问及索尼最近宣布将从2028年1月开始停止为新游戏制作光盘的影响时，小型游戏零售连锁店Pink Gorilla Games的共同所有者Cody Spencer说得很好。“很难过。这个决定只对游戏玩家不利。我们正在失去[…]的能力
